description: Files should not exist on a task card - files should be a top level thing on the header - with a way to select the main directory or a workspace - remove it from the card (maybe on the card just show files modified in that session!)

summary: Implemented the dashboard file browser as a top-level workspace-aware feature with project/task workspace selection, updated the header/app wiring, and added session file indicators on task cards with backend support. Added new workspace hooks/components, refreshed modal/header tests, and created the required dashboard changeset. Full pnpm test/build execution is currently blocked in this worktree because node_modules/dependencies are missing, so verification could only proceed up to environment constraints.
